reviews.review_msg: Probably the easiest professor I've had. His marking schemes are, for the most part, straight forward. Everything you need to know is in the lecture slides, and he puts them up punctually. A great teacher to have if you're already motivated and just want a quick credit. He will not make you terribly interested in Linguistics if you aren't already.

His assignments are fairly easy, but you can never be sure what grade you will get on his exams. Midterm/Final: There was no mode for our class; all the grades were spread out. The Prof is helpful, but CONFUSING at times.. ask ask clarify argue argue. The notes he posts on webct are his lectures therefore many ppl end up not coming to class.
exm hard..always no time to finish..and think about questions...

i had him 3 years ago for 221 and i would have said he was the worst teacher ever, fast forward 3 years and i'd say he's one of the best. he's very clear, his marking isn't that bad either as long as you've been paying attention in class. but this isn't exactly the easiest class so, you'd better stay on top of things!

I liked his lectures a lot, but his exams were really REALLY REALLY bad.  He did not give enough practice with questions before and he always crammed too much into the tests.  I understood everything and did well, but I have a feeling most of my classmates were lost with his exams. It was his first time teaching the course tho.
good lectures and notes.. but hard exams
he's good, but he's not easy at all! if u care about ur GPA he's not the option... o_o
hard!
Awesome class. Kochetov is a great teacher. He gets the material across, is super organized and is fun. One one the best ling profs I've had so far
Lovely and kinda cute. He makes a lot of improvement in his course. The best professor in SFU!!

I worried about the course when I registered it because his rating was so low here. Now, it's almost the end of the semaster, I can say he's one of the best teacher I've ever had. He respects student and give student chances to pull up their marks. he always answers student questions with a BIG SMIL

don't listen to all the haters, kochetov is good.
 lectures are clear, presentation is good, lots of practice for exams.
 one of the better profs I've had.
Kinda boring.
he's smart but he doesn't realize he is not delivering his messages properly. horrible lectures, midterms are ok if u memorize the whole book, hard marker
No Comments
No Comments

Dont do this to urself!!! do not take a class with him!! u will defenitely regreat it! He needs more teaching experience~~ i dont think that he has the skills~~lectures are useless.he is unprepared or prepares too much and he has to rush thro the material

He absolutely is a smart person himself, but he does not understand that his students aren't that bright. Overall he's quite helpful at times .... but his communication with his students were not too clear regarding the area of the tests ...

If you can take this class with anyone else... do it!!! Don't let the Prof. practice his teaching skills on you!! (He needs a lot of practice!) Exams were ridiculous - don't take this course if you like phonology b/c you'll detest it afterwards.

Do not take this course with him...you'll regret it.  He's a nice prof (or tries to be) but he needs to learn how to TEACH properly. He does not understand that we are students learning at an introductory level... he thinks everybody is as smart as he is!
he's a nice prof but a little bit hard
NEVER TAKE HIS CLASS (or else you will regret it)

so-so-so hard! the 1st mid-term is "a little ok"..and the 2nd mid-term..OMG..i was like..err I didn't know how to do ALL the questions...and the assignments and notes is not helpful for the mid-terms..
Very Uninformative. Incoherent explanations to questions.
Exams were VERY difficult!  His lecture notes were not helpful at all!!  The text was unclear AND VERY technical.  If there is another prof teaching this, take the alternative.
woah what a class, i dont think ive ever fluked out in a class ever as that one, thank goodness for his scale!
very difficult!
His Midterm was soo hard...too many quetions to do ....
